tagline: Safer medication routines for you and your family.
accessibility_note: Large text and high contrast are enabled by default.
testDb_description: Temporary page: verifies Supabase + i18n in the client shell.
testDb_signedOut: Sign in (same browser session) to load your medications.
testDb_ready: Session active; RLS applies to the query below.
scan_prescription_aria: Open camera to photograph a prescription
scan_analyzing_step1: The AI is reading ingredients and dosing from your photo…
scan_analyzing_step2: Cross-checking with the FDA open database…
scan_analyzing_step3: Preparing a summary you can confirm…
scan_network_error: The upload was interrupted. Check your signal and try again with a smaller or closer photo.
scan_save_error_auth: Sign in to save this medication.
scan_save_error_profile: Your profile is still loading. Wait a moment and try again.
scan_save_error_generic: Could not save. Check your connection and try again.
schedule_sign_in: Sign in to see today's medication schedule and reminders.
schedule_hero_empty: No doses scheduled for today. Add a medication from your care team or scan a prescription.
schedule_hero_all_done: You're all caught up for today.
schedule_timeline_empty: No dose times on your timeline for today.
push_banner_body: We can notify you on this device when it is time to take your medication. We only ask for permission when you tap the button below.
push_banner_enabled: Notifications are on. We will alert you at dose time.
push_banner_denied: Please allow notifications for this site in your browser settings.
push_banner_dev: The PWA service worker is disabled in development. Test notifications in a production build.
push_banner_missing_vapid: VAPID public key is not configured. Ask your administrator to set NEXT_PUBLIC_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY.
push_banner_need_sign_in: Sign in first to turn on notifications.
push_banner_error: Could not enable notifications. Try again in a moment.
ddi_banner_pair: Taking {{drugA}} with {{drugB}} may increase side-effect risk. Talk with your doctor or pharmacist.
ddi_banner_more: Plus {{count}} more combination(s) on your list.
ddi_modal_disclaimer: This information comes from public FDA data. It is not a diagnosis and does not replace your clinician.
ddi_modal_source_label: Source: interactions section of the FDA label for {{drug}}.
ddi_modal_reports_value: About {{count}} adverse event reports in openFDA listed both medicines (counts are approximate and not proof of causation).
ddi_modal_reports_unknown: Co-report counts are not available for this pair right now.
